shorts.title: Quote of the day by Joe Biden: “Failure at some point in your life is inevitable, but giving up is unforgivable”
shorts.title_distilled: Quote of the day by Joe Biden: “Failure at some point in your life is inevitable, but giving up is unforgivable”.
shorts.description: Joe Biden’s quote, “Failure at some point in your life is inevitable, but giving up is unforgivable,” shows a philosophy transformed by decades of public service and personal challenges. The statement separates failure from quitting, making setbacks as unavoi…

shorts.title: Hospital fire underscores region's health care capacity challenges
shorts.title_distilled: Hospital fire underscores region's health care capacity challenges.
shorts.description: The fire that shut Lehigh Valley Hospital-Dickson City reignited anxieties about health care capacity challenges, just days after a deal that saved Commonwealth Health’s Scranton hospitals.

shorts.title: Fire at Pennsylvania Hospital Forces Evacuation of Dozens of Patients
shorts.title_distilled: Fire at Pennsylvania Hospital Forces Evacuation of Dozens of Patients.

shorts.description: Tenor Health Foundation completed its acquisition of Commonwealth Health and its hospitals in Scranton and Wilkes-Barre in a deal many see as a lifeline for the Scranton facilities.

shorts.title: ATHLETE OF THE WEEK: Eva Kaszuba, Scranton Prep basketball and swimming
shorts.title_distilled: ATHLETE OF THE WEEK: Eva Kaszuba, Scranton Prep basketball and swimming.
shorts.description: Scranton Prep’s junior’s two-sport standout was into heavy medal this weekend. First, Kaszuba totaled nine points, six rebounds, three assists and two steals to help the basketball team beat Valley View, 52-47, in the District 2 Class 4A final at Mohegan Arena — the Classics’ fourth straight title and eighth in nine years. Then at the District 2 Class 2A Swimming Championships, she won gold in the 100-yard breaststroke, was part of the victorious 200-yard medley relay and 200-yard free relay teams and took bronze in the 50-yard freestyle to help Scranton Prep capture the team title over Dallas, 266.5-253. […]
shorts.content: Scranton Prep’s junior’s two-sport standout was into heavy medal this weekend. First, Kaszuba totaled nine points, six rebounds, three assists and two steals to help the basketball team beat Valley View, 52-47, in the District 2 Class 4A final at Mohegan Arena — the Classics’ fourth straight title and eighth in nine years. Then at the District 2 Class 2A Swimming Championships, she won gold in the 100-yard breaststroke, was part of the victorious 200-yard medley relay and 200-yard free relay teams and took bronze in the 50-yard freestyle to help Scranton Prep capture the team title over Dallas, 266.5-253. […]
shorts.content_distilled: Scranton Prep’s junior’s two-sport standout was into heavy medal this weekend.

shorts.title: Carbondale UNICO inducts new members
shorts.description: Two new members were inducted by Carbondale UNICO at Pettinato’s restaurant in Carbondale. The inductees were sworn in by President Bob Tomaine, center. The new members are Theresa Gowat, left, and Emilene Pittsman, right.
shorts.content: Two new members were inducted by Carbondale UNICO at Pettinato’s restaurant in Carbondale. The inductees were sworn in by President Bob Tomaine, center. The new members are Theresa Gowat, left, and Emilene Pittsman, right.
shorts.content_distilled: Two new members were inducted by Carbondale UNICO at Pettinato’s restaurant in Carbondale.

shorts.title: Clipboard, March 3, 2026
shorts.description: Jermyn Pizza sale: Knights of Columbus Council 7622 will sell premade, uncooked pizza Fridays during Lent; 12-cut square pizza for $12, available for pickup from 4-6 p.m. at the parish centers of Sacred Heart of Mary Church in Jermyn and St. Thomas Aquinas Church in Archbald. Order and prepay by Wednesday for pickup Friday. Call Grand Knight Kevin Pittack, 570-510-7758. Lackawanna County Ham and cabbage dinner: Northeastern Detachment Marine Corps League annual ham and cabbage dinner, March 14, noon-5 p.m. or sold out, at the detachment, 1340 Alder St., Scranton; tickets available at the door, public welcome. Midvalley Cheesecake fundraiser: […]

shorts.title: Froggy 101 spreads warmth through coat drive
shorts.title_distilled: Froggy 101 spreads warmth through coat drive.
shorts.description: United Neighborhood Centers of Northeastern Pennsylvania received a donation of more than 100 brand-new winter coats, along with hats and scarves, from Froggy 101 to support the Angel’s Attic Food & Clothing Pantry, located at 410 Olive St. in Scranton. These winter essentials were collected through Froggy 101’s annual coat drive and were distributed to families in need who visit the pantry. The donation came at a critical time as families prepared for colder weather and faced increasing costs of living. UNC’s Community Services Department, which houses the Angel’s Attic Food & Clothing Pantry, provides food, clothing and household essentials […]

shorts.title: Lackawanna County Court Notes, March 3, 2026
shorts.description: MARRIAGE LICENSES Marissa Siconolfi and Christopher George Daher, both of Scranton. Claudia Yelissa Herrera-Garrido and Manuel Orlando Leger-Paulino, both of South Abington Twp. PROPERTY TRANSACTIONS John Zachary Monahan and Stephanie J. Murphy, South Abington Twp., to Justin Roach and Rebekah Smith, Scranton, as joint tenants with rights of survivorship; a property at 162 Edgewood Drive E., South Abington Twp., for $320,000. Richard J. Drury, executor of the estate of Patricia E. Petrone, now or formerly of Copiague, N.Y., to Ryan M. Sandor, Taylor; a property at 101 Parkview Drive, South Abington Twp., for $343,509. Courtney Brissett and John A. Simeon, […]

shorts.title: FILM ROOM PODCAST: Eva Kaszuba joins Season 2 Episode 27
shorts.title_distilled: FILM ROOM PODCAST: Eva Kaszuba joins Season 2 Episode 27.
shorts.description: Welcome to Season 2 Episode 27 of the Film Room Podcast! Scranton Prep basketball player and swimmer Eva Kaszuba joins hosts Joe Baress and Joby Fawcett to discuss capturing District 2 gold in both sports, what it’s like balancing basketball and swimming, the importance of her family in her athletic journey, what it took for the basketball team to win a district title with five new starters, being a part of the Scranton Prep swimming community and more. We also recap the busiest weekend if high school sports with the District 2 basketball and swimming championships and wrestling regionals, share […]
shorts.content: Welcome to Season 2 Episode 27 of the Film Room Podcast! We also recap the busiest weekend if high school sports with the District 2 basketball and swimming championships and wrestling regionals, share […]
